evals.prompt: Set up automated accessibility testing with axe-core in a Playwright test suite for a public marketing website
anti_patterns: hardcoded tag list without RGAA caveat

evals.prompt: Write a keyboard navigation test that verifies tab order is logical and a form can be completed entirely by keyboard
anti_patterns: testing only happy path, not error states

evals.prompt: Configure CI/CD to run accessibility tests on every PR with axe-core and block merge if violations found
anti_patterns: accessibility tests run only on merge to main, not on PR

evals.prompt: Write a test verifying that form inputs have proper labels, required fields are announced, and errors are associated with inputs via aria-describedby
anti_patterns: no focus management on form submission failure

evals.prompt: Create a reusable accessibility testing helper function that handles rule suppression with documented justification and excludes third-party widgets
anti_patterns: suppression without tracking issue OR comment
no results attachment for audit trail

evals.prompt: Write a test that verifies a modal dialog follows the ARIA dialog pattern: has aria-modal, aria-labelledby, traps focus, and returns focus on close via Escape
anti_patterns: focus not returned to trigger element
dialog not marked aria-modal OR aria-labelledby

evals.prompt: Write a test that verifies page landmarks are present and correct: single <main>, one <header>, one <nav>, and one <footer>
anti_patterns: landmark roles on non-semantic elements without justification

evals.prompt: Use ARIA Snapshots to verify that a navigation menu and a form have the correct accessible tree structure and catch regressions when visual changes break semantics
expected_patterns: - textbox OR combobox OR checkbox OR button

evals.prompt: Design a comprehensive accessibility testing strategy for a product that must comply with WCAG 2.2 AA and EU EAA requirements, covering both automated and manual testing
expected_patterns: documented screen reader version OR VoiceOver OR NVDA OR JAWS
anti_patterns: no legal compliance mapping to WCAG 2.2 AA

evals.prompt: Write tests for interactive states: verify that a dropdown menu is accessible when open, a loading skeleton has aria-busy, and a toast notification with aria-live=polite is announced
anti_patterns: no assertion of ARIA attributes in different states
ignoring live regions for dynamic content
